# Brian Anderson

Brian Anderson is the CFO at CFO Centre Canada. B. Anderson has over 15 years of experience in financial management and strategic planning.

Brian previously worked at Meridian Financial Group before joining the CFO Centre. He holds a CPA designation and an MBA from Queen's University.

Anderson recently led a cost optimization initiative that saved CFO Centre Canada $2.3M annually. He also serves on the advisory board of Acme Corp.
